title: Word Overflow
description: No more trimming texts on book screens and sign blocks!
body:
When using custom fonts in Minecraft, you might go whole hog crazy over signs with truncated text and trimmed book pages. This mod will be a solution!

Word Overflow is fully client-side, and this mod modifies the text truncation logic on sign blocks and book screen to show it completely.

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UR6RChIO/images/0201b4fb7e3ec726f4de24ab8105c5d113e8f450.png)

It also works for books!

![books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UR6RChIO/images/17627b371b62b56033eef921f96ac4cabcdb5e0c.png)

**What does Word Overflow NOT do:**
- Raise any character limits with book pages or so.

Some books written by others may be trimmed in some side cases, that's why Word Overflow is here! \
It only modifies RENDER things...
